title: This Is The Largest Chunk Of Mars On Earth
description:
This is the largest piece of Mars we’ve ever found on earth! 

It contains a rare glass created only under the intense shock wave pressures from an asteroid impact. We think this piece was ejected off Mars by an asteroid and sent hurtling towards Earth…

But how do we know it’s from Mars and not somewhere else? 

Also…someone just bought it for $5.3 MILLION…

For more optimistic science and tech stories subscribe!

#science #Mars #asteroid #meteorite #space #shorts
